name: White Bread ABM-Large Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature (70-80 degrees Fahrenheit).
2. Place the ingredients into a bread maker in the following order: flour, sugar, salt, yeast, milk, and butter.
3. Select the Normal setting on the bread maker.
- Alternatively, for a Speed setting, substitute with fast-rising yeast (1-1/2 teaspoons) if preferred.
